subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! In the sight of this servant, all who dwell upon the earth are accepted; none is rejected or condemned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق در نزد این عبد جمیع من علی الارض مقبول مطرودی نه و مغضوبی نیست و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
